apiStrings: Paste a YouTube link. Get the full transcript in seconds. Click any line to jump to that moment, translate to 100+ languages, or open it in ChatGPT and Claude. No signup, no limits.
Pre-filled prompts. Copies the prompt + full transcript and opens your chat tool.
Summarize the following YouTube transcript in 5 bullet points, then add a one-paragraph TL;DR.
Extract the key takeaways from this YouTube transcript as a numbered list. Be specific. Cite timestamps where useful.
Create a 10-question multiple-choice quiz based on this YouTube transcript. Provide answers at the end.
Pull the 7 most quotable lines from this YouTube transcript verbatim. For each one add a timestamp and a one-line context note.
Rewrite this YouTube transcript as a 1200-word blog post with H2 headings, an SEO meta description, and a strong opening hook.
Turn this YouTube transcript into a 10-tweet thread. First tweet is a hook, last tweet is a CTA. Keep each tweet under 280 characters.
Turn this YouTube transcript into clean Cornell-style study notes with cue questions, the main notes, and a summary.
How to convert a YouTube video to a transcript
We pull captions directly from YouTube — auto-generated or manual. Click any line to jump the player to that moment.
Embedded YouTube player. Click any transcript line to seek the video to that exact second.
Pick the caption track and a target language. Translation keeps the original timestamps.
Regular videos, Shorts, embeds, share URLs — all supported. Auto-generated captions included.
Same captions data, four workflows. Each one ships the full feature set — embedded player, click-to-jump, translation, AI prompts.
Paste a link, one-click send the transcript to ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for a summary.
Download subtitle files for Premiere, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, and CapCut.
How do I convert a YouTube video to a transcript?

Paste any YouTube video URL into YouTube2Text and click Get Transcript. The full transcript appears in seconds with timestamps. You can copy, export as TXT/SRT/VTT/Markdown, translate, or send to ChatGPT or Claude.
Can I get a transcript without captions?
YouTube2Text works with any video that has manual captions or auto-generated subtitles. Almost every public YouTube video has auto-generated subtitles.
How do I get a transcript for a YouTube Short?
ll translate the transcript into 100+ languages while keeping the original timestamps.
Yes. Export to plain TXT, SubRip (SRT), WebVTT (VTT), or Markdown. Useful for adding subtitles in Premiere, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, and CapCut.
Is there a YouTube transcript API?

YouTube2Text only retrieves the publicly available caption data YouTube already serves with each video — it never downloads the video itself. Independent service, not affiliated with YouTube or Google.
